title: OpenProof Receipt
description: Canonical JSON Schema for OpenProof proof receipts — a portable, self-contained cryptographic attestation format. See docs/spec/receipt-specification.md for the full specification.

commitment.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical receipt body (excluding commitment and signature fields). Computed, included for self-description. Verification MUST recompute and compare.

commitments.description: Array of commitment hashes. REQUIRED when type is 'bundle'. MUST be absent when type is 'proof-receipt'.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata. Keys: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$. Values: String, Number (integer or finite float), Boolean, or null. Nested objects and arrays NOT permitted.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. Currently only 'ed25519' is valid.

publicKey.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 public key (32 bytes raw, 43 base64url characters, no padding).

value.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature (64 bytes raw, 86 base64url characters, no padding). Signs the raw 32-byte SHA-256 commitment digest.

subject.description: Hash of the content being attested to. For type 'proof-receipt': SHA-256 of the content bytes. For type 'bundle': SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of the sorted commitments array.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch seconds (uint64, UTC). Non-negative. Maximum: 253402300799 (year 9999).

type.description: Receipt type. 'proof-receipt': standard single-subject attestation. 'bundle': aggregated attestation over multiple receipt commitments.
